name: Rodriguez Family
description: The Rodriguez family of four including two minor children received a 3-day pay or quit notice. They lost rental income when the primary earner was hospitalized. The landlord has refused any payment plan and the eviction court date is in 48 hours.

name: Anh Nguyen
description: Anh Nguyen is a long-term resident of 19 years with a final order of removal. She missed her immigration hearing because her attorney filed an incorrect address change. Her US-born daughter has a serious medical condition requiring her mother's care. Deadline for motion to reopen is 72 hours.

name: Marcus Webb
description: Marcus Webb was terminated without receiving his final two weeks of wages. His former employer has a documented history of wage violations cited by the state labor department. He has a 14-day window to file with the labor commissioner before the employer closes operations.

name: Keisha Brown
description: Keisha Brown is seeking emergency custody modification after her ex-partner failed to return their child following a scheduled weekend visit 4 days ago. She has had no contact and filed a police report. The family court emergency docket has a 21-day wait.

name: Jin Park
description: Jin Park was constructively dismissed after raising safety violations with HR. His employer has not issued a COBRA notice or final paycheck. He has 30 days before the statute of limitations on his wrongful termination claim begins to run.
